prestazioni: Engine swap to a Toyota 4A-GE 20V 'Silver Top' (engine code: 4A-GE) with a custom bellhousing adapter for the Charade's C52/C53 transaxle, retaining FWD layout. Pair with a TODA Racing 87mm forged crank, 86mm forged pistons (9.5:1 CR), and TODA Racing Type-R camshafts (272° duration, 11.5mm lift) for a 9,000 RPM redline. Use a HKS 2640 turbocharger (internally gated, .64 A/R turbine housing) with a custom top-mount manifold and HKS SSQV blow-off valve. Fuel system upgrades include a Walbro 450 LPH in-tank pump, ID1000x injectors, and a Link G4+ Xtreme ECU with custom wiring harness for full sequential injection and individual coil-on-plug control.

Chassis reinforcement via a Cusco bolt-in 4-point roll cage (GTF-001) with integrated strut tower braces and a custom front subframe brace using 4130 chromoly tubing. Suspension overhaul with Ohlins Road & Track DFV dampers (custom valving for the Charade's 2,200mm wheelbase), Eibach Pro-Kit springs (25mm drop), and polyurethane bushings from SuperPro (part #SPF0114K for front control arms, SPF0115K for rear trailing arms). Braking system includes DBA 5000 Series rotors (280mm front, 240mm rear) with Ferodo DS2500 pads and braided stainless steel lines from Goodridge.

Drivetrain upgrades include a Cusco OS Type-2 limited-slip differential (2-way, 40% preload) for the C53 transaxle, paired with a custom 4.444 final drive ratio (using Toyota AE101 gears). Clutch system features a Tilton 5.5-inch twin-disc setup with a billet flywheel (10.5 lbs) and a hydraulic release bearing. Exhaust system is a custom 3-inch stainless steel header-back setup with a Burns Stainless merge collector and a Fujitsubo Giken AX500 muffler (2.5-inch outlet).
estetica: Full Rocket Bunny widebody conversion (PB-001 kit) with custom carbon fiber overfenders (25mm wider front, 35mm wider rear) and a custom front splitter with integrated canards (3D-printed from PETG for weight savings). Rear diffuser is a custom 3-piece unit with Gurney flaps, fabricated from 2mm aluminum and finished in raw brushed texture. Hood is replaced with a Seibon carbon fiber unit (part #DHC-001) featuring a 20% weight reduction and a functional NACA duct for intercooler cooling.

Wheel setup includes Work Meister S1 3P 15x8.5 +15 front and 15x9.5 +20 rear (ET adjusted for clearance), wrapped in Toyo R888R tires (195/50/15 front, 225/45/15 rear). Fender vents are custom laser-cut aluminum (inspired by the 964 RS) with mesh inserts for heat extraction. Lighting upgrades include Hella Rallye 4000 headlights (H4 conversion) with custom CREE LED high-beams and a custom LED taillight setup using Osram LED chips (sequential turn signals, integrated reverse lights).

Interior features a full Bride Zeta III reclinable bucket seat (custom mounting brackets for the Charade's floorpan) with a Takata 4-point harness. Steering wheel is a Nardi Classic 350mm (deep dish, suede) with a Works Bell quick-release hub. Gauge cluster is replaced with a Defi Advance BF series (oil pressure, oil temp, boost, wideband AFR, and EGT) mounted in a custom carbon fiber pod. Shift knob is a custom titanium piece (weight: 80g) with a 3D-printed shift pattern overlay (glow-in-the-dark resin).
